mapper.select:
SELECT id, unit_name, tag_number, instrument_name, source_tag_number, source_form, material, strength, power_supply, output_signal, measuring_range, accuracy, whether_interlocked, interlock_setpoint, installation_location_and_purpose, specification_model, manufacturer, radioactive_status, factory FROM radiation_instrument
and tag_number like CONCAT( #{queryParams.tagNumber}, '%')
and instrument_name = #{queryParams.instrumentName}
and radioactive_status like CONCAT ('%',#{queryParams.radioactiveStatus}, '%')
and factory like CONCAT ('%',#{queryParams.factory}, '%')

SELECT id, unit_name, tag_number, instrument_name, source_tag_number, source_form, material, strength, power_supply, output_signal, measuring_range, accuracy, whether_interlocked, interlock_setpoint, installation_location_and_purpose, specification_model, manufacturer, radioactive_status, factory FROM radiation_instrument
and tag_number like CONCAT( #{tagNumber}, '%')
and instrument_name = #{instrumentName}
and radioactive_status like CONCAT ('%',#{radioactiveStatus}, '%')
and factory like CONCAT ('%',#{factory}, '%')
